mapper.select: SELECT ACTOR_ID , ACTOR_NAME , ACTOR_PROFILE_URL , FILE_GROUP_ID FROM ACTOR
SELECT A.ACTOR_ID , A.ACTOR_NAME , A.ACTOR_PROFILE_URL , A.FILE_GROUP_ID , AP."CHARACTER" FROM ACTOR A INNER JOIN APPEARANCE AP ON A.ACTOR_ID = AP.ACTOR_ID WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
SELECT ACTOR_ID , ACTOR_NAME , ACTOR_PROFILE_URL , FILE_GROUP_ID FROM ACTOR WHERE ACTOR_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACTOR ( ACTOR_ID , ACTOR_NAME , ACTOR_PROFILE_URL , FILE_GROUP_ID) VALUES ( 'AC-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_ACTOR_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') , #{actorName} , #{actorProfileUrl} , #{fileGroupId})
